Steps: Open staging home page on desktop and mobile
Expected Result: Page loads without errors; main content, images, header, and footer are visible

Steps: Click each header/footer navigation link
Expected Result: Each link goes to the correct section or page without layout issues

Steps: Test home page on mobile, tablet, and desktop widths
Expected Result: Text, images, buttons, and forms do not overlap or overflow

Steps: Fill all required fields and submit the contact form
Expected Result: Form submits successfully and shows a clear success message

Steps: Submit contact form with missing or invalid fields
Expected Result: Clear validation messages appear and no broken page occurs

Steps: Complete the booking flow with valid test details
Expected Result: Booking is accepted and confirmation/success message appears

Steps: Try booking with missing required fields
Expected Result: Clear validation messages appear and invalid booking is not submitted

Steps: Try selecting unavailable or blocked dates if visible
Expected Result: Blocked dates cannot be selected or are clearly marked

Steps: Use Stripe test card 4242 4242 4242 4242 with any future expiry and any CVC
Expected Result: Payment succeeds in test mode only and booking state updates correctly

Steps: Use a Stripe test failure card if available
Expected Result: Payment failure is handled gracefully with a clear message

Steps: Log in with staging admin credentials
Expected Result: Tester reaches admin dashboard

Steps: Try an incorrect login
Expected Result: Access is denied with a clear error and no dashboard access

Steps: Open admin dashboard after login
Expected Result: Dashboard loads without errors

Steps: Open bookings page after creating a test booking
Expected Result: Test booking appears with correct details

Steps: Create a new gallery with test details
Expected Result: Gallery is created and appears in admin list

Steps: Upload several test images to a staging gallery
Expected Result: Images upload successfully and thumbnails/previews render

Steps: Set or change a gallery cover image
Expected Result: Selected cover image is saved and shown correctly

Steps: Update gallery title/details/access information
Expected Result: Changes save and remain after refresh

Steps: Delete a staging-only gallery or photo
Expected Result: Item is removed and page remains stable

Steps: Open gallery browse page
Expected Result: Page loads without errors and appropriate content is shown

Steps: Open a test gallery using its access code
Expected Result: Gallery loads only when the correct code/access path is used

Steps: Try downloading a test gallery if enabled
Expected Result: Download starts successfully and downloaded file opens

Steps: Change a safe staging setting and save
Expected Result: Setting persists after refresh and does not affect production

Steps: Submit a contact/booking flow that should send email
Expected Result: Email is received by the staging/test recipient only

Steps: Open admin URL in private/incognito window
Expected Result: User is redirected to login or denied access

Steps: Load key pages on normal connection
Expected Result: Pages feel responsive and no page hangs for more than a few seconds

Steps: Use browser refresh/back during booking, admin, and gallery flows
Expected Result: No blank screen or unexpected crash occurs

Steps: Test main flows in Chrome and Safari/Edge if available
Expected Result: Core flows work in each tested browser
